name: Context & Token Optimization
description: Reduces prompt size through deduplication, smart truncation, context reduction, and dynamic model selection to stay within token budgets. Tracks iteration memory to carry discoveries forward across iterations.

Managers/ContextDeduplicationService.cs.content:
class ContextDeduplicationService
  DeduplicateContext(string fullPrompt, string taskId) -> DeduplicatedPrompt
  InjectContext(DeduplicatedPrompt deduplicatedPrompt, HashSet<string>? includeOnly = null) -> string
  GetMinimalTeamMemberPrompt(DeduplicatedPrompt originalPrompt, string memberRole) -> string
  CleanupOldCache(TimeSpan maxAge) -> void
  GetCacheStatistics() -> CacheStatistics
  Hash: string
  Type: string
  Content: string
  FirstSeen: DateTime
  LastUsed: DateTime
  UseCount: int
  Type: string
  Hash: string
  StartIndex: int
  Length: int
class DeduplicatedPrompt
  TaskId: string
  Text: string
  CachedElementHashes: List<string>

Managers/ContextReducer.cs.content:
class ContextReducer
  ReducePromptContext(string originalPrompt, int retryCount, long lastTokenEstimate) -> string
  Content: string
  Type: SectionType
  Priority: double

Managers/IterationMemoryManager.cs.content:
class IterationMemoryManager
  RecordIteration(string taskId, int iteration, IterationMemory memory) -> void
  GetPreviousIterations(string taskId) -> List<IterationMemory>
  BuildIterationContext(string taskId, int currentIteration) -> string
  ExtractMemoryFromOutput(string output, int iteration) -> IterationMemory
  CleanupOldMemories(TimeSpan maxAge) -> void
class IterationMemory
  Iteration: int
  Timestamp: DateTime
  KeyDiscoveries: List<Discovery>
  FailedApproaches: List<FailedApproach>
  ImportantFiles: List<FileReference>
  ProgressMetrics: ProgressMetrics?
class Discovery
  Type: string
  Description: string
  Impact: string?
  Timestamp: DateTime
class FailedApproach
  Approach: string

Managers/ModelComplexityAnalyzer.cs.content:
class ModelComplexityAnalyzer
  QuickModelSelection(int teamSize, int resultSizeChars, bool hasErrors) -> string
  DetectedIndicators: List<ComplexityIndicator>
  Name: string
  Weight: double
  Occurrences: int
class ModelSelectionResult
  BaseScore: double
  FinalScore: double
  RecommendedModel: string
  Factors: Dictionary<string, double>
  Reasoning: string
  Phase: FeatureModePhase
  TeamSize: int

Managers/SmartTruncationService.cs.content:
class SmartTruncationService
  TruncateWithSemantics(string content, int maxTokens, TruncationPriority priority) -> TruncatedResult
  Content: string
  Type: ContentType
  Score: double
  StartLine: int
  EndLine: int
  Content: string
  PreservedSections: List<string>
  TruncatedSections: List<string>
  PreservedByType: Dictionary<ContentType, int>
  AverageImportance: double
class TruncatedResult
  ChildId: string?
  Content: string
  OriginalLength: int
  TruncatedLength: int
  PreservedSections: List<string>
  TruncatedSections: List<string>
  ImportanceScore: double

patterns: Cache hashing for repeated prompt blocks
